nodes.name: Client Check-in Call
nodes.description: name: Client Check-in Call | time_block: 11:00 AM - 12:00 PM | description: Remote video call with client to discuss project status. Light work commitment from hotel room. | travel_method: None | expected_cost: Work | highlights: Work call, Remote meeting

nodes.description: name: Email Catch-up Block | time_block: 2:00 PM - 3:00 PM | description: Dedicated time_block to respond to accumulated work emails. Optional but recommended to stay on top of inbox. | travel_method: None | expected_cost: Work | highlights: Work admin, Optional task

nodes.name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
nodes.description: name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride | time_block: 10:30 AM - 1:30 PM | description: Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. nodes.name: Royal Ontario Museum
nodes.description: name: Royal Ontario Museum | time_block: 10:00 AM - 12:30 PM | description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history. nodes.name: Niagara Falls Day Trip
nodes.description: name: Niagara Falls Day Trip | time_block: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM | description: Full-day excursion to Niagara Falls. nodes.description: name: CN Tower EdgeWalk | time_block: 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM | description: Thrilling hands-free walk around the outside of CN Tower at 356 meters.
